    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

    P

    paintComponent(Graphics) - Methode in Klasse view.GUIBoard
    When GUI-Board is initialized, this method will be called automatically to draw the Lines, Nodes and Stones.
    persistance - Package persistance
     
    persistenceManager - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    phase - Variable in Klasse persistance.PlayerData
     
    phaseBlack - Variable in Klasse persistance.Move
     
    phaseBlack - Variable in Klasse persistance.MoveData
     
    phases - Package phases
     
    phaseWhite - Variable in Klasse persistance.Move
     
    phaseWhite - Variable in Klasse persistance.MoveData
     
    placedStones - Variable in Klasse persistance.PlayerData
     
    placedStones - Variable in Klasse players.PlayerEntity
     
    placedStonesBlack - Variable in Klasse persistance.Move
     
    placedStonesBlack - Variable in Klasse persistance.MoveData
     
    placedStonesWhite - Variable in Klasse persistance.Move
     
    placedStonesWhite - Variable in Klasse persistance.MoveData
     
    placeStone(Stone) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.Node
    Assigns the given Stone to this node and vice versa.
    placeStone(PlayerEntity, Stone, Node) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
    Places a Stone on the specified Node if the move is valid according to the rules.
    player - Variable in Klasse players.ImaginativePlayer
     
    Player - Klasse in players
    This class represents a human player in the game.
    Player(String) - Konstruktor für Klasse players.Player
    Constructor for the Player class.
    playerBlack - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    PlayerData - Klasse in persistance
    Represents a serializable snapshot of player data in the game.
    PlayerData(String, String, int, List<Integer>, String, DifficultyLevel) - Konstruktor für Klasse persistance.PlayerData
    Creates a new PlayerData instance capturing the state of a player at a specific moment.
    playerEntity - Variable in Klasse phases.GamePhase
     
    PlayerEntity - Klasse in players
    This class represents the abstract base class for different players.
    PlayerEntity(String) - Konstruktor für Klasse players.PlayerEntity
    Constructs a player with the given name.
    playerMove - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    playerRemove - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    players - Package players
     
    playerWhite - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    potentialMills - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
     
    printBoard(Map<Integer, Node>) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
    Prints the current state of the game board, displaying each node's ID and the owner of the stone at that node, if one exists.
